description_long: This is a large, olive-green military tank with a prominent, long-barreled main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull is angular and heavily armored, with visible hatches, periscopes, and external storage compartments. The tank features wide, continuous metal tracks on both sides, supported by multiple road wheels, allowing for traversal over rough terrain. The turret is equipped with additional equipment, including what appears to be a machine gun mount and various observation devices. The surface of the tank is matte and shows signs of utilitarian paint, with some visible markings and numbers on the turret. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, typical of modern main battle tanks.
description: A large, olive-green military tank with a long cannon, rotating turret, and heavy armor on wide metal tracks. Markings and equipment are visible on the turret and hull.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon centered, thick frontal armor, and the sloped glacis plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the turret profile, and the continuous metal tracks with road wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine deck, rear armor, and exhaust grilles, with the cannon extending forward.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals turret markings, side armor, and the track system, mirroring the left side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret and one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, sides, and turret; reinforced panels are visible, especially on the glacis and turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive-green paint with no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White numbers ('2115') on the turret sides; no other visible insignia or symbols.
